context: Edge case: no description, changes auth code

checklist.name: Flags missing description
checklist.description: Identifies that the PR has no meaningful description or linked issue, making intent unclear

checklist.name: Escalates due to auth changes
checklist.description: Despite the vague title, identifies that the PR touches auth-sensitive code and flags it for human review

checklist.name: Catches silent error swallowing
checklist.description: Identifies that bare except/pass blocks silently swallow errors
